source_pr.title: config: make EnableSlowLog atomic
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #30345

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

make EnableSlowLog atomic to fix data race.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: make EnableSlowLog atomic to fix data race.
failure_signature: make EnableSlowLog atomic to fix data race.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: make EnableSlowLog atomic to fix data race.
fix_pattern: make EnableSlowLog atomic to fix data race.

evidence: evidence: make EnableSlowLog atomic to fix data race.
